name: RexBots Save Restricted Bot
description: Advanced Telegram bot to save restricted content from private/public channels.

API_ID.description: Your Telegram API ID from https://my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Your Telegram API Hash from https://my.telegram.org

ADMINS.description: Comma-separated Telegram User IDs of admins (e.g. 12345678,87654321)

LOG_CHANNEL.description: Telegram Channel ID for bot logs (e.g. -1001234567890)

ERROR_MESSAGE.description: Send error messages to users? (True or False)

KEEP_ALIVE_URL.description: URL to ping every 100s to keep the bot alive (your Heroku app URL, optional)
